name: trail-replay
description: Open source GPX trail visualization and video generation app

scripts.build: vite build && npm --prefix trailreplayV2/app ci && npm --prefix trailreplayV2/app run build && node scripts/copy-v2.mjs
scripts.postbuild: cp public/robots.txt dist/robots.txt && cp public/sitemap.xml dist/sitemap.xml && cp public/ads.txt dist/ads.txt
